UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the system.

id.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Auth (same as document ID).

role.description: The user's role in the system.

department.description: The department the user belongs to (for non-students).

employeeId.description: The employee ID for the user (for non-students).

passwordChangeRequired.description: If true, the user must change their password on next login.

assignedDepartmentId.description: The ID of the specific department a Supervisor is assigned to.

hasCompletedLabSetup.description: Indicates if a teacher has completed the initial lab selection setup.

InventoryItem.title: Inventory Item
InventoryItem.description: Represents an item in the laboratory inventory.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the item was added by the custodian.

verifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the supervisor verified the item.

inaccuracyReason.description: Reason for the item being marked as inaccurate.

isVisibleToStudents.description: If true, the item is visible to students in the borrowing interface.

BorrowHistory.title: Borrow History
BorrowHistory.description: Represents a single borrowing transaction or request.

inventoryItemId.description: The ID of the specific inventory item document.

itemQuantity.description: The quantity of the item being borrowed or reserved.

reservationId.description: A unique ID to group multiple items under a single reservation.

returnCondition.description: The condition of the item upon return.

returnNotes.description: Detailed notes about the return condition, especially if parts are missing or broken.

resolutionStatus.description: The resolution status of a damaged/lost item report.

ActivityLog.title: Activity Log
ActivityLog.description: A record of any significant action performed in the system.

action.description: e.g., Created Department, Deleted Item, Checked Out

details.description: Human readable details about the action.

RoleFlag.title: Role Flag
RoleFlag.description: A document whose existence grants a user a specific role.

Department.title: Department
Department.description: Represents a department or a major laboratory grouping.

prefix.description: A unique prefix used for grouping channels/facilities.

Channel.title: Channel
Channel.description: Represents a specific room or laboratory within a department.

ChannelAccessRequest.title: Channel Access Request
ChannelAccessRequest.description: A teacher's request to gain access to a specific laboratory.

subject.description: The subject or reason for the access request.

StudentDepartmentAccessRequest.title: Student Department Access Request
StudentDepartmentAccessRequest.description: A student's request to gain access to a specific department.

subject.description: The subject or reason for the access request.

teacherId.description: The ID of the supervising teacher for the subject.

/inventory_items/{itemId}.description: Stores all inventory items for all labs.

/borrowing_transactions/{transactionId}.description: Stores all borrowing transactions and requests.

/activity_logs/{logId}.description: Audit trail for all significant actions in the system.

/roles_property_custodian/{userId}.description: Grants a user the 'Property Custodian' role.

/channels/{channelId}.description: Stores the list of rooms/laboratories within departments.

/channel_access_requests/{requestId}.description: Stores teachers' requests for lab access.

/student_department_access_requests/{req.description: Stores students' requests for department access.
